title: Helictotrichon macrostachyum

The genus Helictotrichon is a group of grasses native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. Helictotrichon macrostachyum is further classified as a species within the genus. The classification of Helictotrichon macrostachyum places it within the kingdom Plantae, along with other flowering plants.
